text.title: Team Mode CLI Flag (`--team-config` Overlay) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the team-mode-cli-flag methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: name-team-fields
step.action: List which Faion config fields must be team-scoped (model whitelist, MCP allowlist, secrets policy).

step.name: sign-overlay
step.action: Sign with team ed25519 key; store signature inline (base64).

step.name: deploy-overlay
step.action: Publish to `/etc/faion/team.yaml` or S3 path referenced by `FAION_TEAM_OVERLAY`.

step.name: verify-resolution
step.action: Run `faion --team-config <path> config show` on a dev box; confirm overrides applied and signature verified.
step.decision-gate: If verification fails, REVOKE and re-sign.
